commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/launcher-v2.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/launcher-v2.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation rollout restart deploy sglang-baseline 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pods 2>&1'
